title: Add beskid_treesitter submodule and repo manifest entry

source.subject: Add beskid_treesitter submodule and register in repo manifest.

body:
Registers `beskid_treesitter` grammar submodule for editor/CI consumers (`@cyber-nomad-collective/beskid-tree-sitter`) and updates AGENTS sync guidance from `beskid.pest`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`62f764a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/62f764a)
- **Subject:** Add beskid_treesitter submodule and register in repo manifest.
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Registers `beskid_treesitter` grammar submodule for editor/CI consumers (`@cyber-nomad-collective/beskid-tree-sitter`) and updates AGENTS sync guidance from `beskid.pest`.
